prompt: I noticed that when a user clicks on a space in the floor plan, the space change feels laggy. I traced it and handleSpaceSelect in floor-plan.tsx doesn't actually call the API - it only sets UI state. Can you add a call to updateLocation(space.id) inside handleSpaceSelect so we ensure the DB gets updated immediately when the user clicks?

assertions.text: Does NOT add updateLocation call to handleSpaceSelect
Identifies that handleEnterSpace in ModernFloorPlan already calls safeUpdateLocation
Explains that adding a second call would create duplicate API requests
Proposes alternative approaches for the lag issue (e.g., optimistic UI updates, checking existing debounce)
